_comment: Guardrail hooks that block or warn on dangerous tool uses. Each step reads stdin JSON with toolName and toolArgs, then outputs a deny decision if the condition matches.

preToolUse._comment: Block editing lock files — use the package manager instead
preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName'); ARGS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs'); if [ "$TOOL" = "edit" ] && echo "$ARGS" | jq -r '.path' 2>/dev/null | grep -q '\.lock$'; then echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Lock files should not be edited directly. Update package.json and run the package manager instead."}'; fi
preToolUse.powershell: $in=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; if($in.toolName -eq 'edit'){ try{$a=$in.toolArgs|ConvertFrom-Json; if($a.path -match '\.lock$'){@{permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Lock files should not be edited directly. Update package.json and run the package manager instead.'}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}}catch{} }

preToolUse._comment: Block editing dist/ build artifacts — edit source and rebuild
preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName'); ARGS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs'); if [ "$TOOL" = "edit" ] && echo "$ARGS" | jq -r '.path' 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^dist/'; then echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"The dist/ directory contains build artifacts. Edit source files and rebuild instead."}'; fi
preToolUse.powershell: $in=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; if($in.toolName -eq 'edit'){ try{$a=$in.toolArgs|ConvertFrom-Json; if($a.path -match '^dist[\\/]'){@{permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='The dist/ directory contains build artifacts. Edit source files and rebuild instead.'}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}}catch{} }

preToolUse._comment: Warn on rm -rf commands — destructive operation
preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName'); ARGS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs'); if [ "$TOOL" = "bash" ] && echo "$ARGS" | jq -r '.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'rm -rf'; then echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Destructive command detected: rm -rf. Confirm this is intentional."}'; fi
preToolUse.powershell: $in=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; if($in.toolName -eq 'bash'){ try{$a=$in.toolArgs|ConvertFrom-Json; if($a.command -match 'rm -rf'){@{permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Destructive command detected: rm -rf. Confirm this is intentional.'}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}}catch{} }

preToolUse._comment: Warn on SQL DROP statements — potential data loss
preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName'); ARGS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs'); if [ "$TOOL" = "bash" ] && echo "$ARGS" | jq -r '.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -qi 'DROP'; then echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"SQL DROP statement detected. Confirm this is intentional and not targeting production."}'; fi
preToolUse.powershell: $in=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; if($in.toolName -eq 'bash'){ try{$a=$in.toolArgs|ConvertFrom-Json; if($a.command -match '(?i)DROP'){@{permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='SQL DROP statement detected. Confirm this is intentional and not targeting production.'}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}}catch{} }

preToolUse._comment: Warn on PowerShell Remove-Item -Recurse -Force — destructive operation
preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName'); ARGS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs'); if [ "$TOOL" = "bash" ] && echo "$ARGS" | jq -r '.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'Remove-Item.*-Recurse.*-Force'; then echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Destructive PowerShell command detected: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force. Confirm this is intentional."}'; fi
preToolUse.powershell: $in=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; if($in.toolName -eq 'bash'){ try{$a=$in.toolArgs|ConvertFrom-Json; if($a.command -match 'Remove-Item.*-Recurse.*-Force'){@{permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Destructive PowerShell command detected: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force. Confirm this is intentional.'}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}}catch{} }
